summary: Completed E2E testing of Quote & Discount Code System. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All admin pages working - Discount Codes, Create Quote, Quotes list, and Pricing page all functional.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_subscriptions_quotes.py - Created comprehensive Subscriptions, Quotes, and Discount Codes API tests
seed_data_creation: Discount codes and quotes created during testing are stored in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote & Discount Code System fully working. Backend has comprehensive APIs for subscription plans, discount codes, quotes, and store pricing. Frontend admin pages at /admin/discount-codes, /admin/create-quote, /admin/quotes all working. Pricing page at /subscription/pricing displays all plans correctly with individual and store tabs.
